message.content:
### Top Spas in Katy, TX
TripAdvisor ranks **All Is Well Holistic Spa**, **Head Harmony Spa**, and **Spa World Houston** as the top three massage and wellness centers in Katy based on user reviews[1]. Other highly regarded options include **Spavia Cinco Ranch** for luxury day spa experiences and **Hand & Stone Katy** for affordable massages and facials[4][6].

### Comparison Table
| Spa Name                  | Key Services                          | Location (Katy, TX)              | Hours (as available)                  | Notable Features                     |
|---------------------------|---------------------------------------|----------------------------------|---------------------------------------|--------------------------------------|
| **All Is Well Holistic Spa** | Holistic massages, wellness treatments | Not specified[1]                | Not specified                        | #1 on TripAdvisor[1]                |
| **Head Harmony Spa**      | Head/spa massages                     | Not specified[1]                | Not specified                        | #2 on TripAdvisor; focuses on relaxation[1] |
| **Spavia Cinco Ranch**    | Massages, facials, day spa            | 10705 Spring Green Blvd[6]      | Mon-Fri 10am-8pm; Sat 9am-6pm; Sun 11am-5pm[6] | Resort-like amenities, memberships[6] |
| **Hand & Stone Katy**     | Massages, facials, skincare           | 23541 Westheimer Pkwy[4]        | 7 days a week[4]                     | Affordable pricing, personalized pressure[4] |
| **SkinSpirit Katy**       | Botox, fillers, facials               | Not specified[7]                | Mon 10am-5pm; Tue-Fri 9am-7pm; Sat 9am-6pm[7] | Medical spa, free consultations[7]   |
| **Face to Face Spa**      | Beauty med spa treatments             | Katy, TX 77494[3]               | Not specified                        | Medically supported, calming setting[3] |
| **About Face & Body**     | Botox, laser resurfacing, peels       | 9555 Spring Green Blvd[5]       | M-F 8:30am-5pm[5]                    | Positive staff reviews[5]            |
| **The Modern Halo**       | Head spa, scalp/hair treatments       | Katy, TX[2]                     | Not specified                        | Scalp health and hair growth focus[2] |

### Key Insights
- **Rankings and Reviews**: TripAdvisor's 2026 list prioritizes holistic and massage-focused spas like All Is Well and Head Harmony, indicating strong user satisfaction for relaxation services[1].
- **Service Variety**: Day spas like Spavia offer full relaxation packages[6], while med spas (e.g., SkinSpirit, About Face) emphasize injectables and advanced skincare[5][7].
- **Accessibility**: Most are in the 77494 area near Spring Green Blvd or Westheimer Pkwy, with extended weekend hours at places like Spavia and SkinSpirit[4][6][7].
- **Specialties**: For head/scalp focus, consider Head Harmony or The Modern Halo[1][2]; for medical aesthetics, SkinSpirit or Face to Face[3][7].

Availability and ratings may vary; check directly for current bookings[1][4][6].
